result: The raw survey datasets have been cleaned and preprocessed into a single file. The process included loading the tab-delimited files, merging them by the ID variable (NSID), harmonizing missing value codes according to the specified standard (-9, -8, -1, -3, -2, -7), and creating age-specific derived variables for urban/rural classification (regub15, regub16), government office region (regov15, regov16, regov_w8, regov_w9), and international residence status (regint_w9). The final cleaned dataset is saved as 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'.
